entities.name: Land and Houses Public Company Limited

financial.note: CTBC is the major shareholder (46.61%) of LHFG; their capital and digital banking expertise directly support LH's financial wing performance.
Primary provider of mortgages for LH residential projects; 2026 targets 10-12% loan growth to sustain property sales velocity.
Holds 6.39% equity; provides institutional stability and reflects long-term confidence in the Thai property yield cycle.

supply_chain.note: Primary supplier of cement and construction materials; rising input costs in the 2026 index directly compress residential GPM.
The 2026 global commodity price drop (World Bank forecast) acts as a tailwind for LH's construction cost management.

competitors.note: Intense rivalry in the luxury and mid-to-high-end single-detached house segments.
Competition for nationwide mass-market horizontal projects and high-rise condominiums.
Rivalry in the affordable housing segment, particularly townhouses in Greater Bangkok.

macro_commodity_factors.logic: Lower 2026 interest rates (BoT cuts) reduce mortgage hurdles for buyers and lower the interest expense on LH's high corporate debt.
1.8% GDP forecast for 2026 drives organic housing demand and consumer purchasing power for the premium segment.
Rising local costs (1.09% increase in Jan 2026) for electromechanical and wood products increase the Cost of Sales.
